title: Improve extraction skill for creativity research graph building
description: Improve the extraction skill or underlying matters CLI so creativity research sources yield useful candidate matters, observable conditions, and dependency proposals.
acceptance_criteria: Extraction results on the test corpus are materially better against the documented expectations, and automated or reproducible checks cover the changed behavior.

title: Test current extraction skill on creativity research sources
description: Run the current extraction skill/CLI against the creativity research corpus and record where candidate matters, conditions, deduplication, or dependency proposals are weak.
acceptance_criteria: Test output is captured; specific failure modes and improvement targets are recorded as notes or follow-up Beads.

title: Define creativity research extraction test corpus
description: Select representative source material for creativity research extraction: notes, papers, conversations, URLs or markdown exports.
acceptance_criteria: A small test corpus exists or is referenced, with expected high-level matters, condition quality expectations, and dependency-review expectations.

title: Harden extraction skill for creativity research
description: Test and improve the matters extraction workflow enough to start building a useful matters graph for creativity research.
acceptance_criteria: The extraction skill has representative creativity-research tests; identified extraction gaps are fixed or tracked; the workflow can produce reviewed matters and dependency candidates for a creativity-research graph.

title: Verify matters.global website delivery
description: Verify end-to-end that matters.global serves the intended website over HTTPS after DNS propagation.
acceptance_criteria: matters.global loads the intended site over HTTPS; certificate is valid; redirect/canonical behavior for www vs apex is recorded.

title: Fix matters.global DNS for GitHub Pages
description: Apply the DNS and GitHub Pages configuration changes needed for matters.global to serve the website.
acceptance_criteria: Required A/AAAA/CNAME records and GitHub Pages custom-domain configuration are corrected, with no conflicting records left in place.

title: Audit matters.global GitHub Pages and DNS configuration
description: Inspect the current GitHub Pages settings, repository Pages configuration, CNAME file if any, and DNS records for matters.global.
acceptance_criteria: Current repo Pages target, custom-domain setting, CNAME state, registrar/DNS records, and observed DNS/HTTP behavior are documented in the issue notes.

title: Publish matters.global via GitHub Pages
description: Make the custom domain matters.global reliably point to the project's GitHub Pages website.
acceptance_criteria: matters.global resolves to the intended GitHub Pages site; HTTPS is valid; apex/www behavior is explicit and tested.

title: Add shorthand matter creation CLI
description: Implement a human-friendly matters create command that can create one or more matters with inline conditions and dependency chains from a compact expression such as 'go to Mars (human lands and stays on Mars for at least one year) > build spaceship > assemble spaceship in earth orbit'.
close_reason: Implemented matters create shorthand with tests and README docs

title: Build initial creativity research matters graph
description: Use the tested extraction workflow to create the first reviewed matters graph for creativity research.
acceptance_criteria: Reviewed creativity-research matters, conditions, and dependencies are persisted to the chosen matters state file or exported for explicit acceptance.
